stories.name: next-dispatcher
stories.title: Create /base:next dispatcher command
stories.description: Create plugins/base/commands/next.md from scratch. The file must contain valid YAML frontmatter and the full 7-step dispatcher logic: read BACKLOG.md, parse ## Findings, filter by type (halting on leading [question] and aborting on non-canonical types), apply the confirmation gate (AskUserQuestion when >=2 actionable findings), derive a unique marker, and dispatch via Skill to /base:bug or /base:feature. The file's presence satisfies auto-registration (AC-MANIFEST-1). No other file is modified by this story.
stories.scope: Create plugins/base/commands/next.md. No other file is touched.

stories.name: bug-backlog-promote
stories.title: Add backlog:<marker> mode to /base:bug
stories.description: Modify plugins/base/commands/bug.md at exactly two insertion points. Insertion 1 (Step 1 input detection): add an ELSE IF branch after the existing marker-detection block that sets mode to BACKLOG_PROMOTE when the argument begins with 'backlog:'. Insertion 2 (Step 4 wrap-up): after the result.json write succeeds, if pending_finding_removal is set, perform a single read-modify-write on BACKLOG.md to remove the source bullet. All other sections of bug.md are unchanged. The BACKLOG_PROMOTE flow must: locate the unique matching [bug] finding, abort on zero/multiple/non-bug matches, scaffold bug-reports/{slug}-report.md, handle slug collisions, capture pending_finding_removal, and fall through to the normal flow.
stories.scope: Modify plugins/base/commands/bug.md at two insertion points only. No other file is touched.

stories.name: orient-crossref
stories.title: Add /base:next cross-reference to /base:orient Rule 8
stories.description: Modify plugins/base/skills/orient/SKILL.md at one insertion point: append a suggestion line to the Rule 8 findings-ready-to-promote block (currently at SKILL.md:143-149 per exploration.json). The appended line must recommend /base:next as a one-shot dispatch follow-up when at least one actionable finding exists. All existing Rule 8 prose, trigger conditions, and detection rules are untouched. The orient skill must remain strictly read-only after this change.
stories.scope: Modify plugins/base/skills/orient/SKILL.md at one insertion point in the Rule 8 block. No other file is touched.
